mapper.sql: r.id, r.reservation_number, r.property_id, p.property_name, r.tower_id, tw.tower_name, r.unit_id, u.unit_code, u.unit_name, r.customer_id, c.customer_name, r.reservation_status, r.workflow_status, r.payment_status, CAST(r.reservation_date AS VARCHAR) AS reservation_date, CAST(r.expiry_date AS VARCHAR) AS expiry_date, CAST(r.proposed_lease_start_date AS VARCHAR) AS proposed_lease_start_date, CAST(r.proposed_lease_end_date AS VARCHAR) AS proposed_lease_end_date, COALESCE(ru.total_reserved_units, 0) AS total_reserved_units, COALESCE(ru.total_reserved_area, 0) AS total_reserved_area, COALESCE(ru.total_rent_amount, r.quoted_rent) AS total_rent_amount, COALESCE(ru.total_deposit_amount, r.deposit_amount) AS total_deposit_amount, r.quoted_rent, r.currency, r.deposit_amount, r.created_by, CAST(r.created_date AS VARCHAR) AS created_date, r.converted_lease_id, l.lease_number AS converted_lease_number, r.lead_name, r.notes
CASE WHEN u.unit_type = 'OFFICE' THEN 1850 WHEN u.unit_type = 'RETAIL' THEN 920 ELSE 1100 END
CASE WHEN u.unit_type = 'OFFICE' THEN 17200 WHEN u.unit_type = 'RETAIL' THEN 12800 ELSE 9400 END
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reservation r INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = r.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = r.tower_id INNER JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = r.unit_id INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = r.customer_id LEFT JOIN pm_lease l ON l.id = r.converted_lease_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reservation_id, COUNT(*) AS total_reserved_units, SUM(area) AS total_reserved_area, SUM(rent) AS total_rent_amount, SUM(deposit) AS total_deposit_amount FROM reservation_unit WHERE is_deleted = FALSE GROUP BY reservation_id ) ru ON ru.reservation_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT FROM reservation r INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = r.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = r.tower_id INNER JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = r.unit_id INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = r.customer_id LEFT JOIN pm_lease l ON l.id = r.converted_lease_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reservation_id, COUNT(*) AS total_reserved_units, SUM(area) AS total_reserved_area, SUM(rent) AS total_rent_amount, SUM(deposit) AS total_deposit_amount FROM reservation_unit WHERE is_deleted = FALSE GROUP BY reservation_id ) ru ON ru.reservation_id = r.id WHERE r.reservation_number = #{reservationNumber} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT ru.id, ru.reservation_id, ru.property_id, p.property_name, ru.tower_id, tw.tower_name, ru.unit_id, ru.unit_number, ru.unit_type, ru.area, ru.rent, ru.deposit, ru.tax, ru.reservation_status FROM reservation_unit ru INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = ru.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = ru.tower_id WHERE ru.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND ru.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY ru.id
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET reservation_number = #{request.reservationNumber}, property_id = #{request.propertyId}, tower_id = #{request.towerId}, unit_id = #{request.unitId}, customer_id = #{request.customerId}, reservation_status = #{request.reservationStatus}, workflow_status = #{request.workflowStatus}, payment_status = #{request.paymentStatus}, reservation_date = #{request.reservationDate}, expiry_date = #{request.expiryDate}, proposed_lease_start_date = #{request.proposedLeaseStartDate}, proposed_lease_end_date = #{request.proposedLeaseEndDate}, quoted_rent = #{request.quotedRent}, currency = #{request.currency}, deposit_amount = #{request.depositAmount}, created_by = #{request.createdBy}, lead_name = #{request.leadName}, notes = #{request.notes}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

UPDATE reservation SET reservation_status = #{request.reservationStatus}, workflow_status = #{request.workflowStatus}, payment_status = #{request.paymentStatus}, notes = COALESCE(#{request.notes}, notes), updated_by = #{request.updatedBy}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

UPDATE reservation SET reservation_status = 'CONVERTED_TO_LEASE', workflow_status = 'APPROVED', converted_lease_id = #{leaseId}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

UPDATE reservation SET reservation_status = 'EXPIRED', workflow_status = 'EXPIRED', updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE is_deleted = FALSE AND reservation_status IN ('DRAFT', 'RESERVED') AND expiry_date < #{today}
mapper.select: SELECT id, reservation_id, previous_status, new_status, action_type, remarks, created_by, CAST(created_date AS VARCHAR) AS created_date FROM reservation_status_history WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unit_master WHERE id = #{unitId} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND (status != 'ACTIVE' OR occupancy_status != 'VACANT')
